---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Bio-WM
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: yacine-baghli
---

## Problem / Motivation
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Expected Impact on Metrics
If applicable, describe the expected impact on evaluation metrics (TVD, EPH, HFR, DFR, TME).

## Additional Context
Add any other context, diagrams, or references here.
